docs/architecture.md:171:Routes task types (e.g., `"review.full"`, `"mention.response"`, `"slack.response"`) to specific LLM models. Supports per-task-type overrides from `.kodiai.yml` config and a fallback chain. This allows different models for different workloads (e.g., a faster model for simple mentions, a more capable model for full reviews).
